title: Aliyun Open Sources 0.8B Document Parsing Model OvisOCR2, Ends-to-End Solution Tops OmniDocBench
excerpt: On July 24, Alibaba announced the open-source release of OvisOCR2, a document parsing model with a parameter scale of only 0.8B. In the authoritative document p
content_html:
On July 24, Alibaba announced the open-source release of OvisOCR2, a document parsing model with a parameter scale of only 0.8B. In the authoritative document parsing benchmark OmniDocBench v1.6 evaluation, this model achieved a comprehensive score of 96.58, ranking first and becoming the first end-to-end document parsing model to comprehensively surpass traditional pipeline methods, marking a breakthrough paradigm shift in the field of document intelligence technology.

As a core infrastructure for RAG retrieval, intelligent Q&A, and enterprise knowledge bases, document parsing has long been dominated by the "layout analysis + content recognition" pipeline structure, facing bottlenecks such as high maintenance costs, cumulative errors, and complex deployment. OvisOCR2, based on Qwen3.5-0.8B, overcomes these limitations, enabling single-model generation to output a Markdown representation containing text, formulas, tables, and visual areas in natural reading order.

In terms of technical implementation, the model combines complementary approaches using real and synthetic data, and fully unleashes the potential of compact models through four key methods: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), online policy distillation (OPD), and model ensembling.

blocks.html_en: On July 24, Alibaba announced the open-source release of OvisOCR2, a document parsing model with a parameter scale of only 0.8B. In the authoritative document parsing benchmark OmniDocBench v1.6 evaluation, this model achieved a comprehensive score of 96.58, ranking first and becoming the first end-to-end document parsing model to comprehensively surpass traditional pipeline methods, marking a breakthrough paradigm shift in the field of document intelligence technology.

sentences.en: On July 24, Alibaba announced the open-source release of OvisOCR2, a document parsing model with a parameter scale of only 0.8B.
sentences.zh: 7月24日，阿里巴巴宣布开源OvisOCR2，这是一个参数规模仅为0.8B的文档解析模型。

sentences.en: In the authoritative document parsing benchmark OmniDocBench v1.6 evaluation, this model achieved a comprehensive score of 96.58, ranking first and becoming the first end-to-end document parsing model to comprehensively surpass traditional pipeline methods, marking a breakthrough paradigm shift in the field of document intelligence technology.
sentences.zh: 在权威文档解析基准OmniDocBench v1.6评测中，该模型取得了96.58的综合得分，排名第一，成为第一个全面超越传统管道方法的端到端文档解析模型，标志着文档智能技术领域实现了突破性的范式转变。

blocks.html_en: As a core infrastructure for RAG retrieval, intelligent Q&A, and enterprise knowledge bases, document parsing has long been dominated by the "layout analysis + content recognition" pipeline structure, facing bottlenecks such as high maintenance costs, cumulative errors, and complex deployment. OvisOCR2, based on Qwen3.5-0.8B, overcomes these limitations, enabling single-model generation to output a Markdown representation containing text, formulas, tables, and visual areas in natural reading order.

sentences.en: As a core infrastructure for RAG retrieval, intelligent Q&A, and enterprise knowledge bases, document parsing has long been dominated by the "layout analysis + content recognition" pipeline structure, facing bottlenecks such as high maintenance costs, cumulative errors, and complex deployment.
sentences.zh: 文档解析作为RAG检索、智能问答、企业知识库的核心基础设施，长期以来以“布局分析+内容识别”的流水线结构为主，面临着维护成本高、错误累积、部署复杂等瓶颈。

sentences.en: OvisOCR2, based on Qwen3.5-0.8B, overcomes these limitations, enabling single-model generation to output a Markdown representation containing text, formulas, tables, and visual areas in natural reading order.
sentences.zh: 基于 Qwen3.5-0.8B 的 OvisOCR2 克服了这些限制，使单模型生成能够以自然阅读顺序输出包含文本、公式、表格和可视区域的 Markdown 表示。

blocks.html_en: In terms of technical implementation, the model combines complementary approaches using real and synthetic data, and fully unleashes the potential of compact models through four key methods: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), online policy distillation (OPD), and model ensembling.

sentences.en: In terms of technical implementation, the model combines complementary approaches using real and synthetic data, and fully unleashes the potential of compact models through four key methods: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), online policy distillation (OPD), and model ensembling.
sentences.zh: 在技​​术实现方面，该模型结合了真实数据和合成数据的互补方法，通过监督微调（SFT）、强化学习（RL）、在线策略蒸馏（OPD）和模型集成四种关键方法充分释放紧凑模型的潜力。

content_html_zh:
7月24日，阿里巴巴宣布开源OvisOCR2，这是一个参数规模仅为0.8B的文档解析模型。 在权威文档解析基准OmniDocBench v1.6评测中，该模型取得了96.58的综合得分，排名第一，成为第一个全面超越传统管道方法的端到端文档解析模型，标志着文档智能技术领域实现了突破性的范式转变。

文档解析作为RAG检索、智能问答、企业知识库的核心基础设施，长期以来以“布局分析+内容识别”的流水线结构为主，面临着维护成本高、错误累积、部署复杂等瓶颈。 基于 Qwen3.5-0.8B 的 OvisOCR2 克服了这些限制，使单模型生成能够以自然阅读顺序输出包含文本、公式、表格和可视区域的 Markdown 表示。

在技​​术实现方面，该模型结合了真实数据和合成数据的互补方法，通过监督微调（SFT）、强化学习（RL）、在线策略蒸馏（OPD）和模型集成四种关键方法充分释放紧凑模型的潜力。
